name: Blood & Marbles
overview:
A noir musical telenovela inspired by David Bruno’s album of the same name.

Sequeira, a major businessman in the finishes industry, is found dead near the Santo Inácio Zoo, in Avintes. On his body, two clues are discovered: a red fingernail and a photograph of a mysterious woman. Guedes, a private detective, is hired to solve the crime. Who is the mysterious woman? Where is the former Dragão Sandinense, Crespo? And most importantly, where is Sequeira’s fortune?

trailers.title: Sangue & Mármore: estreia 12 fevereiro na RTP Play
